feature_name: Annual Statement for PIXEL Play credit card users
sop_used: SOP: Card Dispatch and Delivery management 2.1.docx
response:
# PRD SPECIFICATION: Annual Statement for PIXEL Play Credit Card Users

## CURRENT STATE SUMMARY:
Currently, PIXEL Play credit card users can only access monthly statements through the app. Self-employed users who need to file income tax returns must manually download 12 individual monthly statements and consolidate them for their Chartered Accountants. There is no automated annual statement generation or multi-year statement access capability in the current system. Users must contact customer support for historical statements beyond what's available in-app.

---

## SCOPE:

### IN SCOPE:
- Annual statement generation for up to 3 financial years (FY)
- View annual statement within PIXEL app
- Download annual statement as PDF
- Financial year selection interface (FY 2024-25, FY 2023-24, FY 2022-23)
- Statement generation for completed financial years only
- Annual statement access from Statements section
- PDF format with HDFC Bank branding and compliance requirements
- Statement includes: all transactions, payments, fees, charges, rewards earned/redeemed for the FY
- Support for both active and closed cards (if closed within available FY range)

### OUT OF SCOPE:
- Calendar year statements — Indian tax filing follows April-March financial year cycle
- Statements older than 3 financial years — regulatory retention requirements and storage optimization
- Custom date range statements — adds complexity without clear user need validation
- Email delivery of annual statements — security and PII protection concerns for automated emails
- Physical/postal delivery of annual statements — digital-first product strategy
- Statements for supplementary/add-on cards — MVP focuses on primary cardholder, add-on card statements require separate data aggregation logic
- Real-time generation for current incomplete FY — partial year data creates confusion for tax filing purposes
- Statement customization (selecting specific transaction categories) — tax filing requires complete financial picture
- Integration with CA portals or tax filing software — requires third-party partnerships beyond current scope

---

## FUNCTIONAL USE CASES:

### Use Case 1: View Available Annual Statements
**Actor:** PIXEL Play credit card user (self-employed/salaried)  
**Precondition:** User has active PIXEL Play credit card with at least one completed financial year of card usage

**User Story:** As a PIXEL Play credit card user, I want to see which annual statements are available for my card so that I can identify which financial years I can download for tax filing.

**Steps:**
1. User opens PIXEL app and navigates to home screen
2. User taps on "Statements" option in card management section
3. System displays statement type selector with "Monthly" and "Annual" tabs
4. User taps on "Annual" tab
5. System retrieves card activation date and current date
6. System calculates available completed financial years (max 3)
7. System displays list of available FY statements with format "FY 2023-24 (Apr 2023 - Mar 2024)"
8. Each FY entry shows: FY label, date range, file size (if previously generated), "View" and "Download" CTAs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given user has card active since May 2022, when user views annual statements on Jan 15 2025, then system shows FY 2024-25, FY 2023-24, FY 2022-23
- Given user activated card in Nov 2024, when user views annual statements on Jan 15 2025, then system shows "No completed financial years available. Annual statements will be available after March 31, 2025"
- Given user has card active since Feb 2020, when user views annual statements on Jan 15 2025, then system shows only last 3 FYs (2024-25, 2023-24, 2022-23) even though older data exists
- Given current date is April 5 2025, when user views annual statements, then FY 2024-25 appears as available (completed FY)
- Given user's card was closed in Aug 2024, when user views annual statements, then system shows FY 2023-24, FY 2022-23, FY 2021-22 with card status indicator "Card closed on Aug 15, 2024"

**Failure State AC:**
- Given system cannot retrieve card activation date, when user taps Annual tab, then user sees "Unable to load annual statements. Please try again" with retry CTA
- Given network timeout occurs during FY calculation, when user taps Annual tab, then user sees skeleton loader for 3 seconds followed by error state with retry option
- Given user has no transaction history (card never activated), when user taps Annual tab, then user sees "No statements available. Start using your card to generate statements"

**Priority:** P0

---

### Use Case 2: Generate and View Annual Statement for First Time
**Actor:** PIXEL Play credit card user  
**Precondition:** User has selected a completed FY that has not been previously generated; user has active internet connection

**User Story:** As a self-employed PIXEL Play user, I want to generate my annual statement for a specific financial year so that I can review all my credit card transactions before sharing with my CA.

**Steps:**
1. User is on Annual Statements list screen
2. User taps "View" CTA for FY 2023-24 (not previously generated)
3. System displays loading state "Generating your annual statement..."
4. System triggers backend API to compile annual statement data
5. Backend aggregates: all transactions, payments, fees, interest charges, rewards earned, rewards redeemed, opening balance (Apr 1), closing balance (Mar 31)
6. Backend generates PDF with HDFC branding, user details, card details (masked), transaction summary, detailed transaction list
7. Backend stores PDF in secure document storage with user_id + card_id + FY as key
8. System displays PDF in in-app viewer with zoom, scroll capabilities
9. System shows "Download" CTA at bottom of viewer
10. System caches statement locally for offline access

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given user taps View for first time, when statement generation starts, then loading indicator shows with estimated time "This may take 30-45 seconds"
- Given statement has 500 transactions, when PDF is generated, then all 500 transactions appear in chronological order with date, merchant name, amount, transaction type
- Given statement is generated successfully, when PDF opens in viewer, then first page shows: user name, card number (masked), FY period, generation date, summary section (total spends, total payments, total fees, net rewards)
- Given user has earned 15,000 reward points in FY, when statement is viewed, then rewards section shows opening balance, earned, redeemed, closing balance
- Given statement generation completes, when user returns to annual statements list, then FY 2023-24 shows file size and "Last generated on [date]"

**Failure State AC:**
- Given backend API times out after 60 seconds, when generation fails, then user sees "Statement generation is taking longer than expected. We'll notify you when it's ready" with option to continue in background
- Given user has zero transactions in selected FY, when user taps View, then user sees "No transactions found for FY 2023-24. Annual statement cannot be generated"
- Given PDF generation fails due to data corruption, when error occurs, then user sees "Unable to generate statement. Please contact support" with support chat CTA and error code displayed

**Priority:** P0

---

### Use Case 3: Download Annual Statement to Device
**Actor:** PIXEL Play credit card user  
**Precondition:** Annual statement PDF has been generated for selected FY; user has granted storage permissions to PIXEL app

**User Story:** As a PIXEL Play user, I want to download my annual statement to my phone so that I can share it with my CA via WhatsApp or email.

**Steps:**
1. User is viewing annual statement PDF in in-app viewer OR on annual statements list screen
2. User taps "Download" CTA
3. System checks device storage permissions
4. System retrieves PDF from cache (if viewing) or from secure storage (if from list)
5. System saves PDF to device Downloads folder with filename format "HDFC_PIXEL_Annual_Statement_FY2023-24_[Last4CardDigits].pdf"
6. System displays toast notification "Statement downloaded successfully"
7. System shows option to "Open" or "Share" the downloaded file
8. System logs download event with timestamp

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given user taps Download, when storage permission is granted, then PDF saves to Downloads folder within 3 seconds
- Given PDF is 2.5 MB, when download completes, then toast shows "Statement downloaded successfully" with file location path
- Given user taps Download from list view (not in viewer), when download starts, then progress indicator shows percentage completion
- Given statement is already downloaded, when user taps Download again, then system shows "This statement is already downloaded. Download again?" with Confirm/Cancel options
- Given user taps "Share" after download, when share sheet opens, then user sees options for WhatsApp, Email, Drive, other installed apps

**Failure State AC:**
- Given storage permission is denied, when user taps Download, then system shows permission rationale dialog "PIXEL needs storage access to save your statement" with "Go to Settings" CTA
- Given device storage is full (<50MB available), when download is attempted, then user sees "Insufficient storage space. Free up space and try again"
- Given network error occurs during download from secure storage, when download fails, then user sees "Download failed. Check your connection and try again" with retry CTA

**Priority:** P0

---

### Use Case 4: Re-access Previously Generated Annual Statement
**Actor:** PIXEL Play credit card user  
**Precondition:** User has previously generated annual statement for a specific FY; statement PDF exists in secure storage

**User Story:** As a PIXEL Play user, I want to quickly access my previously generated annual statement so that I don't have to wait for regeneration each time.

**Steps:**
1. User navigates to Annual Statements list screen
2. System displays FY entries with indicator "Last generated on Jan 10, 2025" for previously generated statements
3. User taps "View" CTA for FY 2023-24 (previously generated)
4. System checks if PDF exists in local cache
5. If cached, system opens PDF immediately in viewer
6. If not cached, system retrieves PDF from secure storage (3-5 second load)
7. System displays PDF in viewer with same functionality as first-time view
8. User can download again if needed

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given statement was generated 2 days ago and is cached, when user taps View, then PDF opens within 1 second without loading indicator
- Given statement was generated 45 days ago and cache is cleared, when user taps View, then system shows "Loading statement..." for 3-5 seconds before displaying PDF
- Given user views statement, when user navigates away and returns within same session, then statement opens instantly from memory
- Given statement exists in storage, when user taps View, then system does NOT regenerate statement (uses existing PDF)
- Given previously generated statement, when user is on list view, then file size displays next to FY label (e.g., "2.3 MB")

**Failure State AC:**
- Given cached PDF is corrupted, when user taps View, then system attempts to retrieve from secure storage and shows "Retrieving statement..." message
- Given secure storage PDF is missing (deleted/corrupted), when retrieval fails, then user sees "Statement not found. Tap to regenerate" with regenerate CTA
- Given user is offline and PDF not cached, when user taps View, then user sees "No internet connection. Download statement for offline access"

**Priority:** P0

---

### Use Case 5: View Annual Statement for Current Incomplete Financial Year
**Actor:** PIXEL Play credit card user  
**Precondition:** Current date falls within an ongoing financial year (e.g., Jan 2025 during FY 2024-25); user wants to see year-to-date statement

**User Story:** As a PIXEL Play user, I want to understand what happens when I try to view the current financial year's statement so that I know when it will be available.

**Steps:**
1. User navigates to Annual Statements list screen
2. System displays current FY (e.g., FY 2024-25) with status badge "In Progress"
3. User taps on FY 2024-25 entry
4. System displays informational bottom sheet
5. Bottom sheet shows: "FY 2024-25 Annual Statement", "This financial year is still in progress", "Annual statement will be available after March 31, 2025", "You can view monthly statements for this period"
6. Bottom sheet shows "View Monthly Statements" CTA
7. User taps CTA and navigates to Monthly statements tab with current FY months displayed

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given current date is Jan 15 2025, when user views annual statements list, then FY 2024-25 shows with "In Progress" badge and disabled View/Download CTAs
- Given user taps on in-progress FY entry, when bottom sheet appears, then it shows exact date when statement will be available (Apr 1, 2025)
- Given user is on informational bottom sheet, when user taps "View Monthly Statements", then user navigates to Monthly tab with months Apr 2024 to Dec 2024 visible
- Given current date is Apr 5 2025, when user views annual statements list, then FY 2024-25 no longer shows "In Progress" badge and View CTA is enabled
- Given user taps disabled View CTA, when tap is registered, then haptic feedback occurs and bottom sheet appears (no silent failure)

**Failure State AC:**
- Given system date is incorrect (e.g., 2030), when user views annual statements, then system uses server time to determine current FY and shows appropriate status
- Given user's device timezone is different from IST, when determining FY completion, then system uses IST (Indian Standard Time) as reference for Apr 1 cutoff

**Priority:** P1

---

### Use Case 6: Customer Support Agent Assists User with Annual Statement Issue
**Actor:** HDFC Customer Support Agent  
**Precondition:** User has contacted support regarding annual statement issue; agent has access to support center dashboard; user has provided card details for verification

**User Story:** As a customer support agent, I want to view the status of a user's annual statement generation and trigger regeneration if needed so that I can resolve user issues without engineering intervention.

**Steps:**
1. Agent logs into support center dashboard
2. Agent searches for user by card number or mobile number
3. Agent navigates to "Statements" section in user profile
4. System displays annual statements status for user: list of FYs, generation status, generation timestamps, download count, error logs (if any)
5. Agent identifies issue (e.g., statement generation failed, PDF corrupted)
6. Agent clicks "Regenerate Statement" action for affected FY
7. System triggers backend regeneration job with priority flag
8. System displays job ID and estimated completion time to agent
9. Agent communicates status to user and provides job ID for tracking
10. Agent adds notes to user ticket with actions taken

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given agent searches for user, when user profile loads, then Statements section shows all 3 FYs with status: "Generated", "Failed", "Not Generated", "In Progress"
- Given statement generation failed with error, when agent views error logs, then specific error message displays (e.g., "Data aggregation timeout", "PDF generation failed - missing transaction data")
- Given agent triggers regeneration, when job is queued, then system shows "Regeneration initiated. Job ID: ASG-2025-001234. ETA: 2-3 minutes"
- Given regeneration completes successfully, when agent refreshes user profile, then statement status updates to "Generated" with new timestamp
- Given user has downloaded statement 5 times, when agent views download history, then each download event shows timestamp and IP address (for audit)

**Failure State AC:**
- Given regeneration job fails again, when agent checks status after 5 minutes, then error log updates with new failure reason and agent sees "Escalate to Engineering" CTA
- Given user's card data is incomplete in system, when agent attempts regeneration, then system shows "Cannot regenerate: Missing transaction data for FY 2023-24. Escalate to Ops team"
- Given agent lacks permission for regeneration action, when agent clicks Regenerate, then system shows "Access denied. Contact your supervisor for elevated permissions"

**Priority:** P1

---

### Use Case 7: Bulk Annual Statement Generation for Tax Season
**Actor:** System (automated job) / Banking Operations team  
**Precondition:** Financial year has ended (date is April 1 or later); new FY's annual statements need to be pre-generated for all eligible users

**User Story:** As a banking operations team member, I want annual statements to be automatically generated for all users after FY end so that users don't experience delays when accessing statements during tax season.

**Steps:**
1. System cron job triggers on April 2 at 2:00 AM IST
